song.title: O Church Arise
song.author: Keith Getty and Stuart Townend
song.lyrics:
[V1] . A7sus4 D G/B A/C# 1) O Church arise, and put your armor on; . D/F# G A4 A D hear the call of Christ our Captain. . A7sus4 D G/B A/C# For now the weak can say that they are strong, . D/F# G A4 D in the strength that God has given.|| . D/F# G D/F# A With shield of faith and belt of truth, . D/F# G D/F# Bm A we’ll stand against the devil’s lies; . A7sus4 D G/B A/C# An army bold, whose battle cry is Love, . D/F# G A4 D Dsus D reaching out to those in darkness. [V2] . A7sus4 D G/B A/C# 2) Our call to war, to love the captive soul, . D/F# G A4 A D but to rage against the captor; . A7sus4 D G/B A/C# And with the sword that makes the wounded whole, . D/F# G A4 D we will fight with faith and valor.|| . D/F# G D/F# A When faced with trials on every side, . D/F# G D/F# Bm A we know the outcome is secure. . A7sus4 D G/B A/C# And Christ will have the prize for which He died, . D/F# G A4 D Dsus D an inheritance of nations. -!!
[V3] . A7sus4 D G/B A/C# 3) Come see the cross, where love and mercy meet, . D/F# G A4 A D as the Son of God is stricken; . A7sus4 D G/B A/C# Then see His foes lie crushed beneath His feet, . D/F# G A4 D for the Conqueror has risen.|| . D/F# G D/F# A And as the stone is rolled away . D/F# G D/F# Bm A and Christ emerges from the grave, . A7sus4 D G/B A/C# this vict’ry march continues till the day . D/F# G A4 D Dsus D every eye and heart shall see Him. [V4] . A7sus4 D G/B A/C# 4) So Spirit, come, put strength in ev'ry stride, . D/F# G A4 A D Give grace for ev'ry hurdle, . A7sus4 D G/B A/C# That we may run with faith to win the prize . D/F# G A4 D Of a servant good and faithful.|| . D/F# G D/F# A As saints of old still line the way, . D/F# G D/F# Bm A Retelling triumphs of His grace, . A7sus4 D G/B A/C# We hear their calls and hunger for the day . D/F# G A4 D Dsus D When, with Christ, we stand in glory.
